## LibraryData.CollectionFilter.filterDirectory() method

Filters a directory in a `FileTree` using this filter's configuration and optionally supplied parameters.

**Signature:**

```typescript
filterDirectory(dir: FileTree.FileTreeItem, params?: IFilterDirectoryParams): Result<ReadonlyArray<IFilteredItem<FileTree.IFileTreeFileItem, T>>>;
```
